# About dnd-5e-core

**Complete D&D 5th Edition Rules Engine** - A comprehensive Python package implementing all core D&D 5e mechanics.

## 🎯 Purpose

This package provides a **complete, UI-agnostic implementation** of Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition core rules and mechanics. It's designed to work with any interface (pygame, web, CLI, etc.) and includes all necessary game data bundled within the package.

## 🌟 Key Features

- **Complete D&D 5e Rules Implementation**: All core mechanics, classes, races, spells, monsters, and equipment
- **8.7 MB of Bundled Data**: 2000+ JSON files including 332 monsters, 319 spells, 65 weapons, and more
- **Offline-First**: No external API or database required - all data is included
- **UI-Agnostic**: Pure game logic, use with any interface you want
- **Extended Monsters**: Access to 89+ additional monsters from 5e.tools
- **Fully Typed**: Type hints throughout for better IDE support

## 📊 Stats

- **Language**: Python 3.10+
- **License**: MIT
- **Data Size**: 8.7 MB (2000+ files)
- **Monsters**: 332 (official) + 89 (extended)
- **Spells**: 319
- **Equipment**: 332 items (weapons, armor, potions, etc.)

## 🎮 Use Cases

- **Game Development**: Build D&D 5e video games or digital tools
- **Character Management**: Create character sheet applications
- **Combat Simulations**: Run automated combat encounters
- **Learning Tools**: Educational projects for teaching game mechanics
- **DM Tools**: Dungeon Master utilities for campaign management

## 📦 Installation

```bash
pip install dnd-5e-core
```

Or for development:
```bash
pip install git+https://github.com/codingame-team/dnd-5e-core.git
```
